{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113272380035FCE0B4ED6D5E663"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593069488827433752","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看，恐怖刺激。[赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767913619,"group_id":"7592536890843073598","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/8Uk+q3FAzALHMPUHVXj2s=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"7191409755","user_name":"喜欢透骨香的于弘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"7191409755","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7592536890843073598","book_info":{"abstract":"三十岁的市井混混陈寻，意外陷入三天循环的死局——每次午夜十二点过后，都会重回三天前的中午，而循环的终点，是一桩惨无人道的命案。
金案的解剖仪式藏着变态的“净化”阴谋，木案的原始森林里次声波催生致命幻觉，水案的豪华酒店水箱布满绝望抓痕，火案的唐楼废墟刻着未凉的血泪，土案的地下防空洞藏着吃人的恶魔……
五桩五行连环案，陈寻从最初的恐慌逃避，到主动潜入黑暗追凶。他踩着时间的轨迹收集证据，与刑警、律师、卧底联手，对抗隐藏在城市阴影里的组织与人性之恶。
可循环的代价远比想象中沉重：每一次重来，都会剥离一点“正常”；每一次救赎，都要直面更刺骨的黑暗。当他发现，循环不是意外，而是一场被设计的“使命交接”，而自己早已成为棋局中的棋子时，屠龙者是否会沦为恶龙？
他要打破的不只是命案的真相，还有被操控的命运。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5e61e0195f38be0be7cb41ae80695f0e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"砚路寻","author_id":"","book_id":"7592536890843073598","book_name":"循环凶途：五行命案录","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592536937362096702","read_count":"1","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"128200"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"26","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,破案,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5e61e0195f38be0be7cb41ae80695f0e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254843&x-signature=Bn%2F91F3Q2UwdLkKLnoU5so5083U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1892695222259075","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"22"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113272380035FCE0B4ED6D5E663"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8522,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10105,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":
